billing_charges_booking_reason_unique.name: billing_charges_booking_reason_unique
billing_charges_booking_reason_unique.where: "billing_charges"."booking_id" is not null and "billing_charges"."reverses_charge_id" is null

billing_charges_period_check.name: billing_charges_period_check
billing_charges_period_check.value:
"billing_charges"."reason" <> 'subscription_fee'
          or ("billing_charges"."period_start" is not null and "billing_charges"."period_end" is not null and "billing_charges"."period_start" < "billing_charges"."period_end")
